name: Verify validation errors when signing in with empty fields
description:
Test Objective: Verify that the system correctly triggers and displays
    validation error messages when a user attempts to sign in without entering data.
descriptionHtml:
Test Objective: Verify that the system correctly triggers and displays
validation error messages when a user attempts to sign in without entering data.
statusMessage: AssertionError: Expected password error to be one of ["Це поле є обов'язковим", 'Password is required'], but got 'This field is required'
statusTrace:
driver = <selenium.webdriver.chrome.webdriver.WebDriver (session="276167ff7ce9eb3e7fec9a04b6a3a342")>

    @allure.epic("User Management")
    @allure.feature("Login")
    @allure.story("Negative Login Scenarios")
    @allure.suite("Authentication Tests")
    @allure.title("Verify validation errors when signing in with empty fields")
    @allure.severity(allure.severity_level.CRITICAL)
    def test_login_with_empty_fields_shows_validation_errors(driver: WebDriver):
        """
        Test Objective: Verify that the system correctly triggers and displays
        validation error messages when a user attempts to sign in without entering data.
        """
        base_page = BasePage(driver)
    
        sign_in_component = base_page.header.click_sign_in_link()
    
        sign_in_component.clear_email_and_password()
    
>       sign_in_component.compare_error()

tests/ui/login_testing/test_login_with_empty_fields_shows_validation_errors.py:22: 
_ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ 

self = <components.common_components.auth_components.signin_modal_component.SignInComponent object at 0x7fb840334680>

    @allure.step("Verify email and password validation error messages (supports EN/UA)")
    def compare_error(self):
        """
        Waits for error messages to be visible and matches their text content.
        """
        wait = self.get_wait()
        email_error_element = wait.until(
            EC.visibility_of_element_located(self.locators["email_error"])
        )
        password_error_element = wait.until(
            EC.visibility_of_element_located(self.locators["password_error"])
        )
        actual_email_error = email_error_element.text.strip()
        actual_password_error = password_error_element.text.strip()
    
        valid_email_errors = ["Введіть пошту.", "Email is required."]
        valid_password_errors = ["Це поле є обов'язковим",
                                 "Password is required"]
        assert actual_email_error in valid_email_errors, (
            f"Expected email error to be one of {valid_email_errors}, but got '{actual_email_error}'"
        )
>       assert actual_password_error in valid_password_errors, (
            f"Expected password error to be one of {valid_password_errors}, but got '{actual_password_error}'"
        )
E       AssertionError: Expected password error to be one of ["Це поле є обов'язковим", 'Password is required'], but got 'This field is required'

components/common_components/auth_components/signin_modal_component.py:106: AssertionError
